Home Markets

NVIDIA Shares Rise on AI Demand

By Jane Reporter — May 21, 2026

NVIDIA Corporation reported stronger-than-expected demand for its data-center GPUs as hyperscalers expanded AI infrastructure spending. Analysts cited sustained orders from cloud providers and enterprise AI projects as primary drivers.

The company guided revenue above consensus for the next quarter, with gross margins expected to remain in the mid-70% range. Investors reacted positively in after-hours trading.

Competition from custom silicon remains a long-term risk, but near-term supply for H-series accelerators is still constrained, according to supply-chain checks.
